name: Butterfly Bites
recipeIngredient: 6 tbsp Peanut butter or cream cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the celery.
2. Using plastic knives, cut each celery stalk into thirds.
3. Fill each section with one tablespoon of peanut butter or cream cheese.
4. Gently insert a pretzel stick parallel to the length of the celery section on both sides.
5. Arrange raisins or currents as eyes, nose, and mouth.
6. Push slivered almonds or mushroom caps into the filling for antennae.
7. If using mushrooms, place the mushroom tips upward like an antenna.
Nutritional info per butterfly: 238 cal; 9g pro, 33g carb, 10g fat (35%). Source: Kid's Cookshop, Miami Herald 4/4/96, formatted by Lisa Crawford, 4/8/96.
